Acid Breath.name: Acid Breath
Acid Breath.description: The creature has salivary glands which produce a caustic acidic spray.

Breath.name: Breath
Breath.description:
The creature expels a spray of acidic bile in a 30 foot line.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[corroding] condition for 3 Turns.

Acid Spray.name: Acid Spray
Acid Spray.description: The creature has salivary glands which produce a caustic acidic spray.

Acid Spray.name: Acid Spray
Acid Spray.description:
The creature expels a spray of acidic bile in a 10 foot fan.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[corroding] condition for 3 Turns.

Amphibious.name: Amphibious
Amphibious.description: This creature can breath underwater in addition to air.

Animate Boulders.name: Animate Boulders
Animate Boulders.description: The Creature Animates two boulders within 30ft of it.

Animate Boulders.name: Animate Boulders
Animate Boulders.description: The Creature animates two boulders it can see within 30ft of it. These boulders become @UUID[Compendium.builders-crucible-creature-pack.creatures.Actor.FjB79NRT5qOLHMpq] and remain animated until 1 minute has passed or they have died.

Blinding Spit.name: Blinding Spit
Blinding Spit.description: The Creature spits a caustic glob at a target within 30 feet making an attack against the targets reflex defense. On a hit the creature is blinded for 1 turn.

Blinding Spit.name: Blinding Spit
Blinding Spit.description: The Creature spits a caustic glob at a target within 30 feet making an attack against the targets reflex defense. On a hit the creature is blinded for 1 turn.

Cloud of Dust.name: Cloud of Dust
Cloud of Dust.description: The Creature Spins up a cloud of dust blinding opponents.

Cloud of Dust.name: Cloud of Dust
Cloud of Dust.description: The Creature Spins up a cloud of dust in a 15ft pulse making a harmless attack that scales with dexterity against the fortitude defense of targets. On a hit targets are blinded for 1 turn.

Constrict.name: Constrict
Constrict.description: The Creature attempts to Squeeze the life out of its target.

Constrict.name: Constrict
Constrict.description: The creature attempts to squeeze the life out of its target. It makes a weakened athletics attack against its target; on a hit the target becomes Restrained and begins to Suffocate while restrained this way. This Hold can be broken by a athletics attack against the fortitude of the creature by the target or another creature within engagement range.

Critter Form.name: Critter Form
Critter Form.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into the form of a tiny critter.

Critter Form.name: Critter Form
Critter Form.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into the form of a tiny critter of size 1 or less such as a rat, bat, insect, ect. While in this form they are unable to attack but are indistinguishable from that of any other creation of this type outside of the use of the sense gesture. If it is attacked the Creature reverts back to its true form.

Diseasing Proboscis.name: Diseasing Proboscis
Diseasing Proboscis.description: The creature attacks a target with its sharp proboscis, on a hit in addition to damage the creature begins suffering from the Diseased condition until they complete a Rest or Recover Action.

Diseasing Proboscis.name: Diseasing Proboscis
Diseasing Proboscis.description: The Creature Attacks its target inflicting the Diseased condition on a hit. This condition lasts until the target uses a Rest or Recover Action.

Divine Awareness.name: Divine Awareness
Divine Awareness.description: The Planetar knows if it hears a lie.

Drone.name: Drone
Drone.description: The Creature Lets out a long Droning noise disorienting all those around them.

Drone.name: Drone
Drone.description: The creature lets out a long droning noise attacking the Willpower defense of all those who can hear within 20ft. On a hit the attack deals Psychic damage to moral and causes the Disoriented condition for 3 turns.

Earth Walk.name: Earth Walk
Earth Walk.description: The Creature can burrow through natural earth at a speed equal to their stride. Burrowing in this way does not disturb the earth or leave behind a tunnel.

Eternal Suffering.name: Eternal Suffering
Eternal Suffering.description: If this Creature dies while in Hell it returns to life in 24 hours unless it is killed with radiant damage.

Flame Breath.name: Flame Breath
Flame Breath.description: The Dragon Breaths forth a blast of fire in a 20ft cone

Flame Breath.name: Flame Breath
Flame Breath.description:
The dragon Breaths forth a blast of fire in a 20ft cone.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the Burning condition for 3 turns.

Flaming Death.name: Flaming Death
Flaming Death.description: As a last resort the creature blasts itself to pieces in an attempt to take those around it down with it.

Flaming Death.name: Flaming Death
Flaming Death.description: The Creature explodes in a blast of Fire which attacks the Reflex defense of all nearby creatures that fail to resist the effect and upon critical success afflicting them with the @Condition[burning] condition for 3 rounds. Following this the creature is dead.

Flaming Death Burst.name: Flaming Death Burst
Flaming Death Burst.description: When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} dies, it explodes in a volatile burst of fire.

Flaming Death Burst.name: Flaming Death Burst
Flaming Death Burst.description: When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} becomes @Condition[dead], it explodes in a blast of Fire which attacks the Reflex defense of all nearby creatures that fail to resist the effect and upon critical success afflicting them with the @Condition[burning] condition for 3 rounds.

Flight.name: Flight
Flight.description: This creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride.

Frost Breath.name: Frost Breath
Frost Breath.description: The dragon breaths forth a breath of ice cold air freezing anything on contact.

Frost Breath.name: Frost Breath
Frost Breath.description:
The Dragon Breaths forth a breath of ice cold air in a 20ft cone.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the Freezing condition for 3 turns.

Goring Charge.name: Goring Charge
Goring Charge.description: The Creature charges forward up to 15ft making a empowered strike against the against the first creature they encounter. On a critical success the target is also knocked Prone.

Goring Charge.name: Goring Charge
Goring Charge.description: The Creature charges forward up to 15ft making a empowered strike against the first creature they encounter. On a critical success the target is also knocked Prone.

Grab.name: Grab
Grab.description: The creature attempts to grab a creature with its whip like tendrils and squeeze the life from it.

Grab.name: Grab
Grab.description: The creature Wraps its whip like tendrils around its target. If the attack is successful and the target is equal or lesser in Size, the target is also Restrained until this creature chooses to release it or the restraint is otherwise broken. Only one target my be restrained by this action at a time.

Horrifying Visage.name: Horrifying Visage
Horrifying Visage.description: The Creature wails targeting each creature in a 30ft cone. A creature hit by this is Confused for 1 minute.

Horrifying Visage.name: Horrifying Visage
Horrifying Visage.description: The Creature wails targeting each creature in a 30ft cone. A creature hit by this is Confused for 1 minute in addition to any damage dealt.

Hover.name: Hover
Hover.description: This creature may hover in the air, gaining a flying speed equal to their stride and being immune to the prone condition.

Ice Walk.name: Ice Walk
Ice Walk.description: Cryovain can move across and climb icy surfaces as if they were normal terrain

Life Sense.name: Life Sense
Life Sense.description: A creature with this sense can detect any non undead creatures within 100ft of it even if they are behind full cover.

Light Sensitivity.name: Light Sensitivity
Light Sensitivity.description:
While in Bright light, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} suffers 2 Banes to all actions.

This mechanic is handled through an Active Effect that is easily toggled when applicable.

effects.name: Sunlight Weakness
effects.description: The creature suffers banes to all actions when exposed to sunlight.

Lightning Breath.name: Lightning Breath
Lightning Breath.description: The creature Emits a Blast of lightning in a 30ft line.

Breath.name: Breath
Breath.description:
The creature breaths a bolt of lightning in a 30 foot line.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[Shocked] condition for 3 Turns.

Limited Flight.name: Limited Flight
Limited Flight.description: The Creature can temporarily fly but only for a limited time.

Limited Flight.name: Limited Flight
Limited Flight.description: The creature gains a fly speed equal to its stride for 1 minute.

Magic Resistance.name: Magic Resistance
Magic Resistance.description: Magic warps strangely around this creature, Spells which target it suffer +2 banes regardless of their effects.

Negative Energy Pulse.name: Negative Energy Pulse
Negative Energy Pulse.description: The Creature lets out a pulse of necrotic energy that prevents healing.

Negative Energy Pulse.name: Negative Energy Pulse
Negative Energy Pulse.description: The Creature Emits a 20ft Pulse of Necrotic energy which causes targets to become Diseased for 3 turns on a hit.

Paralyzing Breath.name: Paralyzing Breath
Paralyzing Breath.description: The Dragon lets out a breath of gas paralyzing targets.

Paralyzing Breath.name: Paralyzing Breath
Paralyzing Breath.description: The Dragon lets forth a breath of gas in a 10ft fan, that causes the Paralyzed condition on a hit.

Paralyzing Tentacles.name: Paralyzing Tentacles
Paralyzing Tentacles.description: The Creatures tentacles are coated in a paralyzing toxin that helps them capture prey.

Paralyzing Tentacles.name: Paralyzing Tentacles
Paralyzing Tentacles.description: The Creature attempts to grab its target with its tentacles and subject it to its paralyzing toxins. If the attack is successful and the target is equal or lesser in Size, The target is also paralyzed for 1 turn.

Petrifying Bite.name: Petrifying Bite
Petrifying Bite.description: The Cockatrice Bites a target, On a critical hit the target becomes petrified for 24 hours gaining the Incapacitated and Invulnerable conditions. The petrification also ends if the Cockatrice dies.

Petrifying Gaze.name: Petrifying Gaze
Petrifying Gaze.description: The Creature can Petrify creatures that it meets eyes with.

Petrifying Gaze.name: Petrifying Gaze
Petrifying Gaze.description: The Creature locks eyes with one creature that can see it making a harmless attack that scales with toughness targeting willpower defense, if the attack is successful the target is petrified. While petrified the creature is incapacitated and invulnerable. The petrification ends if thus Creature dies.

Phantasms.name: Phantasms
Phantasms.description: The Creature Summons illusory copies of itself making it hard to determine which is the real creature.

Phantasms.name: Phantasms
Phantasms.description: The Creature summons illusory copies of itself making it gain the guarded condition for 1 minute.

Poison Breath.name: Poison Breath
Poison Breath.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to produce and expel toxic discharge in a fan.

Poison Breath.name: Poison Breath
Poison Breath.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} expels toxic discharge in a 10 foot fan, attacking the Fortitude of each target in the area and dealing Poison damage.

On a Critical Hit the attack causes the @Condition[poisoned] condition for 3 Turns.

Poison Cloud.name: Poison Cloud
Poison Cloud.description: The Creature belches up a noxious cloud of gas.

Poison Cloud.name: Poison Cloud
Poison Cloud.description: The Creature makes a Toughness attack against the Fortitude defense of each creature within 5ft. This attack is harmless but causes the poisoned condition for 3 turns on a successful hit.

Repulsion Breath.name: Repulsion Breath
Repulsion Breath.description: The Dragon lets out a burst of repulsive energy blasting back targets in a cone.

Repulsion Breath.name: Repulsion Breath
Repulsion Breath.description: The dragon lets out a blast of repulsive breath in a 20ft cone blasting anyone hit back 10ft.

Restraining Claw.name: Restraining Claw
Restraining Claw.description: The creature uses its powerful claws to grab and hold a target.

Restraining Claw.name: Restraining Claw
Restraining Claw.description: The creature grabs its target. If the attack is successful and the target is equal or lesser in Size, the target is also Restrained until this creature chooses to release it or the restraint is otherwise broken. Only one target may be restrained by this action at a given time.

Rolling Bash.name: Rolling Bash
Rolling Bash.description: The Creature rolls forward up to 15ft making a empowered strike against the first creature they encounter. On a critical success the target is also knocked Prone.

Rolling Bash.name: Rolling Bash
Rolling Bash.description: The Creature charges forward up to 15ft making a empowered strike against the first creature they encounter. On a critical success the target is also knocked Prone.

Rotting Breath.name: Rotting Breath
Rotting Breath.description: The Dragon Breaths out a blast of necrotic gas rotting targets on contact.

Rotting Breath.name: Rotting Breath
Rotting Breath.description: The dragon breaths forth a blast of rotting gas dealing corruption damage to targets in a 10ft fan. On a crit the target gains the Decaying Condition for 3 turns.

Shadow Breath.name: Shadow Breath
Shadow Breath.description: The Dragon Breaths out a blast of necrotic gas rotting targets on contact. If a creature is killed by this attack it rises as a @UUID[Compendium.builders-crucible-creature-pack.creatures.Actor.cMB6VWYRpQRjjPym] in an hour.

Shadow Breath.name: Shadow Breath
Shadow Breath.description: The dragon breaths forth a blast of rotting gas dealing corruption damage to targets in a 10ft fan. A creature killed by this gas rises as a @UUID[Actor.cMB6VWYRpQRjjPym] in 1 hour.

Shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
Shapeshift.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into the shape of a humanoid or beast that is equal or lower than it in level.

Shapeshift.name: Shapeshift
Shapeshift.description: The Creature Shapeshifts into a humanoid or beast of its level or lower.

Siege Monster.name: Siege Monster
Siege Monster.description: This Creature is so large it can easily break down the walls and other structural elements of most structures that are not reinforced.

Sleep Breath.name: Sleep Breath
Sleep Breath.description: The dragon Exhales a cloud of gas in a 10ft fan. This cloud attacks targets Fortitude and causes the target to gain the Asleep Condition for 3 turns.

Sleep Breath.name: Sleep Breath
Sleep Breath.description: The Dragon lets out a breath of gas that inflicts the Asleep Condition on targets in a 10ft fan

Slowing Breath.name: Slowing Breath
Slowing Breath.description: The Dragon exhales gas in a 10ft fan Slowing targets.

Slowing Breath.name: Slowing Breath
Slowing Breath.description: The Dragon exhales gas in a 10ft fan causing the Slowed Condition on a hit.

Smother.name: Smother
Smother.description: The Creature attempts to grapple and choke its target.

Smother.name: Smother
Smother.description: The creature makes unarmed melee attack against a creature in its reach, if it hits the target is grappled, while grappled this way the creature is suffocating.

Spores.name: Spores
Spores.description: The creature creates a cloud of toxic spores.

Spores.name: Spores
Spores.description: The creature makes a Weakened attack against scaling with Toughness against all creatures in a 15ft Pulse targeting Fortitude and dealing the Poisoned condition for 3 turns on a hit.

Squeeze.name: Squeeze
Squeeze.description: Once the creature has a enemy restrained, it will constrict tightly dealing terrible damage to the grasped victim.

Constrict.name: Constrict
Constrict.description: The Creature deals Deadly damage to a target that it currently has Restrained.

Steam Breath.name: Steam Breath
Steam Breath.description: The Creature breaths forth a blast of scalding hot air in a 20ft fan.

Steam Breath.name: Steam Breath
Steam Breath.description:
The Creature breaths forth a blast of scalding hot air in a 20ft fan.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the Burning condition for 3 turns.

Stunning Screech.name: Stunning Screech
Stunning Screech.description: The Creature lets out a earsplitting screech that stuns opponents.

Stunning Screech.name: Stunning Screech
Stunning Screech.description: The Creature makes a harmless Toughness attack against the Willpower defense of every creature within 10ft that can hear them. Each creature that is hit becomes Stunned for 1 turn.

Sunlight Weakness.name: Sunlight Weakness
Sunlight Weakness.description: The creature suffers banes to all actions when exposed to sunlight.

Telepathy.name: Telepathy
Telepathy.description: The Creature can communicate telepathically with other creatures it can see.

Teleport.name: Teleport
Teleport.description: The Creature teleports to a empty location within 120ft.

Teleport.name: Teleport
Teleport.description: The creature teleports to a empty location within 120ft

Tree Stride.name: Tree Stride
Tree Stride.description: The Creature can step from one tree to another as if they were doorways.

Tree Stride.name: Tree Stride
Tree Stride.description: The Creature Steps from one tree within range 1 appearing next to another tree within 60ft of the first. Both trees must be larger than the the Creature.

Two Headed.name: Two Headed
Two Headed.description: The Creature gains Training in the Awareness Skill. In addition only one head ever sleeps at a time, leaving the other awake.

Wailing Moan.name: Wailing Moan
Wailing Moan.description: The Creature wails targeting each creature in a 30ft pulse. A creature hit by this is Confused for 1 minute.

Wailing Moan.name: Wailing Moan
Wailing Moan.description: The Creature wails targeting each creature in a 30ft pulse. A creature hit by this is Confused for 1 minute in addition to any damage dealt.

Weakening Breath.name: Weakening Breath
Weakening Breath.description: The Dragon Exhales a cloud of gas in a 10ft fan. This cloud attacks targets Fortitude and causes the target to gain the Exhausted Condition for 3 turns if they are hit.

Weakening Breath.name: Weakening Breath
Weakening Breath.description: The Dragon lets out a breath of gas that inflicts the Exhausted Condition on targets in a 10ft fan.
